Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, stay behind me. This could be dangerous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}...You're the ones that I often see at the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}It's true that he's been helping us in our battles, but—![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Oh, um... These are Koromaru-san's old friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}They doubt our intentions regarding Koromaru-san, since he's been more frequently injured lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Please, don't be angry... Just calm down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}No wonder they're suspicious of me; my body is completely unnatural to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}No matter how human my heart becomes, my body will always remain a machine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Of course, it's obvious when you think about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}But I'm not strong enough to be a weapon, and I'm too stiff to pass as a human.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}There's nowhere I truly belong... I'm neither completely machine, nor quite human...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}My newfound emotions are something I should be happy about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}But, sometimes... I find myself wishing I could just be an unfeeling machine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}You're right... Even if I can't quite explain it, I have to be true to myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Sorry for bringing all of this up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}If I hadn't been created, I never would have met everyone... And that includes you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}If I can stay by your side, then nothing should faze me. I know that, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I should make sure that Koromaru-san's friends understand our situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I don't want you to end up in danger again, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Aigis and[n]went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
